name: condition-screen-sanity-universe-v1
purpose: Frozen reduced universe for the /condition-screen WHOLE-LIBRARY SANITY SWEEP only. NOT for normal single-condition screens (those use the full STOCK universe). Quant-approved 2026-05-31.
builtFrom: udgaard trading DB stocks+stock_quotes; symbols with >=250 in-window bars; regenerate via build-sanity-universe.py

constraints.orderBlockHandling: OB conditions run on the 50-symbol orderBlock subset; aboveBearishOrderBlock may still time out -> ARS deferred to firewall G13
constraints.inconclusiveGuardrail: sweep cell with dateCount(nDates)<~30 or median 1-2 firings/date = INCONCLUSIVE, not clean

reducedUniverseNotice: REDUCED-UNIVERSE SANITY SWEEP - NOT A FULL-UNIVERSE RESULT. Widens date-clustered SEs -> anti-conservative for the ARS 2xSE test (fragile conditions MORE likely to pass). A clean result here is NOT validation; re-screen on the full universe or run the firewall before any tradability claim. Not edge estimates.
